notebook.cell:
# My Awesome Notebook
This is a markdown cell. - Item 1 - Item 2
print("Hello, world!") def greet(name): return f"Hello, {name}!" greet("Developer")
This is a plain text cell. It's just for simple text.
a = 10 b = 20 print(f"The sum is: {a + b}")
This cell has no type, so it should default to a text cell.
